ul.li: Characteristic: Constant error bound across entire vector space.

g.title: Individual errors are random and tend to cancel out across high dimensions

ul.li: Error Source: Distance to nearest Centroid $C_k$
Error Characteristic: Non-uniform, depends on cluster density.
Voronoi Regions: Error increases toward cluster boundaries.
MSE Minimization: K-Means training optimizes centroid placement.

g.title: Individual errors are random and tend to cancel out across high dimensions
